index.metaDescription: 8 games to liven up any party.
index.title: Our games
index.lead: 8 games to liven up any party. No cards, dice or board needed — just the app.

cameleon.name: Chameleon
cameleon.desc: A secret word is shared among all players… except one: the chameleon. Everyone gives a clue in turn, then the group votes to unmask the impostor. The chameleon has to bluff to blend in — and if unmasked, they get one last shot at survival by guessing the word.

rules.d: Everyone sees the secret word… except the chameleon.
One word, no more. Not too obvious, not too vague.
Unmask the impostor or let them slip away.

gauche-droite.name: Left or Right
gauche-droite.desc: A statement from everyday life appears. Your job: guess whether it leans politically left or right. No judgement, just a quiz — the debate comes naturally after.

rules.d: An opinion, a social fact, a hot take.
Left or right? Pick your side.
The app calls it — and the debate begins.

purete.name: Purity Test
purete.tagline: How many sins on your record?
purete.desc: 30 "have you ever…" questions. Every box you tick drops your purity score. The lower it goes, the more you've lived. Absolute honesty required — what's said here stays here.

rules.d: "Have you ever…" — one at a time.
Tap Never or Guilty for each question.
From 100% (pure) to 0% (living legend).

paranoia.name: Paranoia
paranoia.desc: An asker gets a secret question aimed at a target. The target names someone in the group out loud — but no one knows the question. A coin flip decides whether it gets revealed or stays secret.

rules.d: Something like "who'd crack in prison?". They keep it to themselves.
They name a player out loud. The group panics.
Target loses? The question is revealed to everyone.

medusa.name: Medusa
medusa.desc: Everyone looks down. On the signal "MEDUSA!", look up and stare at someone. If two players lock eyes: penalty. Belly laughs guaranteed.

rules.d: The active player says "Look down!".
On the signal, look up and stare at a player.
Two locked stares? 1 sip each.

apero.name: The Drink
apero.tagline: Guess the card or sip the gap
apero.desc: The dealer draws a card, the player guesses the value. Higher or lower? Miss: drink the gap between your guess and the card. Nail it: the dealer drinks.

rules.d: The card stays hidden. The player tries to guess.
One first guess, a hint, then one last guess.
Miss = |your guess − the card| in sips.

casting.name: The Casting
casting.tagline: Act the scene, fool the jury
casting.desc: A scenario, secret numbers from 1 (disaster) to 10 (oscar-worthy). Each actor plays the scene at their number. The guesser watches and tries to figure out the numbers. Acting, bluff and belly laughs.

rules.d: They watch. Everyone else acts.
From 1 (terrible) to 10 (oscar). The guesser doesn't know.
The guesser assigns a number. The gap = sips.

red-flag.name: Red Flag
red-flag.desc: Are you a red flag? 20 swipe-style questions Tinder-style. Shareable toxicity score. The test your exes wish they could've made you take.

rules.d: 20 questions — one at a time, Tinder-style.
Swipe right for yes, left for no.
The higher it is, the redder the flag.
